title: Low-Income Country Debt Crisis Prevention Framework
description: Concerns grew in the mid-2010s that low-income countries might face a debt crisis similar to one in the 1990s. The IMF and World Bank responded by updating their Low-Income Country Debt Sustainability Framework (LIC DSF) in 2005 and again in 2017. This framework aimed to help low-income countries manage their debt and prevent crises.
